comment: Seed roster for ITS_Subcontractors (ADR-0003, SC-S2). Extracted from the 05_Subcontracts corpus subcontract preambles (the authoritative legal-name source) across all 7 projects, canonicalized. Contact/email/phone/COI/license intentionally blank (filled later per the parked-COI decision). Consumed by scripts/migrations/seed_its_subcontractors.py (find-or-create by name, never overwrites operator edits).
